Our Labs & Facilities

Where Curiosity Meets
World-Class Equipment

Dedicated Robotics Lab

Purpose-built workspace stocked with the latest robotics kits, sensors, actuators and programming tools for every age group.

AC Classrooms

Comfortable, climate-controlled learning environments so students stay focused and engaged during every session.

Advanced Robotics Kits

Professional-grade equipment covering mechanical assembly, electronics and programming across all program levels.

Electronics & Coding Setup

Dedicated electronics benches with components, microcontrollers, oscilloscopes and coding stations ready for every project.

Practical Workstations

Individual project workspaces so every student can build, test and iterate on their own creations in every class.

Small Batch Sizes

8–12 students per batch ensures every child gets personal attention, guidance and hands-on time with the equipment.

Robo Soccer Arena

Our competitive robotics arena where students test their builds in friendly matches and prepare for external competitions.

Robo Soccer ArenaCompetitive robotics
8–12 StudentsPer batch
Branky in Action

A Space Built for Curious Minds

At Branky STEM Labs, we believe technology is best understood through building, experimenting and creating. Our hands-on environment keeps young minds curious, engaged and actively exploring.

Dedicated Robotics LabPurpose-built lab with advanced kits
AC ClassroomsComfortable, focused environment
Advanced Robotics KitsLatest equipment for every program
Electronics & Coding SetupProfessional-grade workstations
Practical WorkstationsHands-on project building spaces
Small Batch Sizes8–12 students per batch

Empowering Young Innovators for Tomorrow's World.

What our kids build

Free Demo Session

Not sure which program is right
for your child?

Book a Free Demo Session — experience the lab, meet the mentors and let your child try a hands-on session before you decide anything.

Book Free Demo — It's Completely Free

Seats fill fast · Vadodara only · No commitment required

Vadodara's full-fledged AI, Robotics & Coding centre for ages 4–14, built around hands-on learning, smart labs and real technology exposure.

Programs

  • STEM Foundations (4–6 Yrs)
  • Foundation of Robotics L1 (7–10)
  • Advanced Robotics L2 (7–10)
  • Core Robotics & Coding (11–14)
  • Advanced Robotics & IoT (11–14)
